DISCOVERY 612, MATTER ARGUED AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO ENFORCE WRITTEN AGREEMENT TO WITHDRAW SUBPOENA FOR EMPLOYMENT RECORDS AND FOR RETURN OF RECORDS AND/OR QUASH SUBPOENA FOR EMPLOYMENT RECORDS IS GRANTED AS IT SEEKS TO QUASH THE SUBPOENA FOR EMPLOYMENT RECORDS. THE SUBPOENA IS OVERLY BROAD, AND COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT AGREED TO WITHDRAW THE SUBPOENA. THE PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO MEET AND CONFER TO PROPERLY LIMIT THE SCOPE OF THE SUBPOENA. ALL REQUESTS FOR SANCTIONS ARE DENIED. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Motion To Enforce Written Agreement To Withdraw Subpoena For Employment Records & For Return Of Records &/Or Quash Subpoena For Employment Records
Off Calendar May-11-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Nadine Zelter, for Plaintiff and moving party
Sheryl Lam for Defendant and opposing party

Ruling:
Matter argued and Tentative Ruling adopted. Plaintiff's Motion To Enforce Written Agreement To Withdraw Subpoena For Employment Records and For Return of Records and/or Quash Subpoena For Employment Records is granted as it seeks to quash the subpoena for employment records. The subpoena is overly broad, and counsel for Defendant agreed to withdraw the subpoena. The parties are ordered to meet and confer to properly limit the scope of the subpoena. All requests for sanctions are denied. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
